free_text: 7Li metal (0.007% 6Li) onto a tantalum backing. The

and selected such that for a particular run the maximum

Proton recoil detector consisted either of a
stilbene crystal of 0.5 cm length and 2.5 cm diam., or
a NE 213 liquid scintillator with the following inside
dim.: length 0.63 cm, diam. 1.26 cm. The scintillators
were coupled to an RCA 8575 photomultiplier.
Crystal of 0.5 cm length and 2.5 cm diameter.
